{
  "summary_en": "TAIEX down ~1% with TSMC leading the decline (-2.06%) despite TSM ADR up 0.38% overnight — a 2.44pp divergence suggests local profit-taking/foreign outflow rather than fundamental news. The split tape is striking: legacy foundry/memory-leveraged names (UMC +3.76%, ADR +9.35%) ripping on memory-tightness narrative (Samsung locking in 2027 deals, SoC shortage), while AI leaders (TSMC, Hon Hai, Largan, MediaTek) sold off. Meta/MSFT/Alphabet capex commentary is constructive long-term but didn't rescue today's tape. Tone: risk-off rotation within tech, not broad capitulation.",
  "summary_zh": "加權指數下跌約1%,台積電領跌(-2.06%),儘管 TSM ADR 昨夜上漲0.38%,本地與 ADR 出現2.44個百分點的背離,顯示本地獲利了結或外資賣超,而非基本面利空。今日盤面分歧明顯:成熟製程/記憶體受惠族群(聯電+3.76%、ADR+9.35%)因記憶體缺貨敘事(三星鎖定2027長約、SoC短缺)大漲;AI龍頭(台積電、鴻海、大立光、聯發科)反而走弱。Meta/微軟/Alphabet 資本支出評論長線正面,但未能撐住今日盤勢。基調:科技股內部風險偏好輪動,非全面性殺盤。",
  "context": {
    "taiex_change_pct": -0.96,
    "tsmc_change_pct": -2.06,
    "tone": "mixed"
  },
  "key_stories": [
    {
      "headline_en": "TSMC sells off 2% locally despite positive ADR and strong hyperscaler capex signals",
      "headline_zh": "台積電本地下跌2%,但ADR上漲且雲端巨頭資本支出訊號強勁",
      "affected_tickers": ["2330.TW", "3008.TW", "3711.TW"],
      "analysis_en": "Microsoft (Azure capacity-constrained), Alphabet (cloud surge), and Meta (AI hardware procurement) all reinforced the AI capex thesis overnight. Yet TSMC fell hard locally while TSM ADR was green — a 2.44pp gap that typically indicates foreign net selling on the local session or position trimming into month-end (April 30). Largan -2.15% and ASE -2.95% suggest the selling extended through the AI/Apple supply chain. Mechanism: month-end de-risking + foreign flow, not a fundamental break. Falsifier: if TSM ADR drops sharply tonight on US session, the local move was the smart leg.",
      "analysis_zh": "微軟(Azure 產能不足)、Alphabet(雲端激增)、Meta(AI 硬體採購)昨夜全面強化 AI 資本支出主軸。然而台積電本地重挫而 TSM ADR 收紅,2.44個百分點的背離通常代表本地外資賣超或月底(4/30)部位調整。大立光-2.15%、日月光-2.95%顯示賣壓擴及 AI/蘋果供應鏈。機制:月底降
